data.entity_name: Neural Models of Retrieval and Recommendation
data.content:
Neural Models of Retrieval and Recommendation
Neural Models of Retrieval and Recommendation is a topic related to recommender systems covered in CSCE 670 Section 600.

Mining of Massive Datasets
Mining of Massive Datasets is an optional textbook for CSCE 670 Section 600, published in 2014, and authored by Jure Leskovec, Anand Rajaraman, and Jeffrey D.

Recommender Systems
Recommender systems are a topic covered in CSCE 670 Section 600, including adversarial information retrieval and neural models.<SEP>A general topic covered in weeks 6 and 7, focusing on methods for suggesting items to users.

Adversarial Information Retrieval
Adversarial Information Retrieval is a topic discussed within recommender systems in CSCE 670 Section 600.

Due Date
The specified deadline for submitting assignments, typically 11:59pm.

Course Specific Late Work Policy
A policy detailing rules for late homework submissions, including the allocation of five late days and the consequence of a grade of 0 after using them.

Student Rule 7
A specific university rule referenced as the basis for exempting makeup work from the late work policy.

Late Work Policy
A policy outlining general rules regarding late submission of academic work, with specific exemptions for makeup work due to excused absences.

Late Day
An indivisible 24-hour unit that can be used to extend homework deadlines.

Homeworks
Assignments given to students in the course, subject to the late work policies.
